_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Review list of prioritized collection requirements and essential information.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of Data Protection Impact Assessment requirements, including regulatory triggers that mandate a DPIA, mandatory assessment elements, supervisory authority consultation obligations, and documentation standards.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.411), RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.406).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.422). Shared vocabulary: [requirements]. DCWF-only terms [collection, essential, information, list, prioritized, review] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessment, authority, consultation, data, documentation, dpia] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.874, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Review list of prioritized collection requirements and essential information." and "Knowledge of Data Protection Impact Assessment requirements, including regulator" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.417 ≈ STS 0.422 (gap 0.005). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [requirements] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [requirements]. DCWF-only: [collection, essential, information, list, prioritized, review]. WIDAI-only: [assessment, authority, consultation, data, documentation, dpia].
